outreach.notes: National tourism org running Slovakia's pavilion program: architectural competition closed 14 May 2026 (winner not public — WATCH); Slovak companies can register for the Expo 2027 program since mid-May 2026 — ask for the registration route + company list angle. No email published in coverage. Sources (B): tasr.sk TASR:2026041100000159 + TASR:2026061900000084.
